name: Bendigo And Adelaide Bank Limited
analysis: BEN's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 20% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.2× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$10.4150, stop A$10.0980, target A$11.5879 (3.70:1) — then trail it.
